title: Bomb squad stormtrooper
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Update|[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]}} {{Organization |image=[[File:Bombtrooper.jpg]] |name=Bomb squad stormtrooper |type= |founder= |leader=[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Vollot]] |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations=[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]][[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' (1977) 56]] |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] **[[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] }} {{Quote|Sergeant Vollot, is your ''bomb squad'' ready?''"
"''Yes, sir, Captain Treece, we'll begin energy scans immediately.|Treece and Vollot|}} '''Bomb squad stormtroopers''', commonly called '''bombtroopers''', were an elite class of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] trained in the activation and deactivation of explosive charges. ==History== The bombtroopers were trained to disarm explosive devices varying from anti-tank mines to primitive spring traps. The bombtroopers were also considered superior to bomb-disposal droids due to their training, which was sufficient to recover an explosive device intact, which allowed for Imperial Intelligence to study it after recovery.''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]'' [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hugo Treece]] dispatched a group of bombtroopers, led by [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Vollot]], to [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] to scan for and disarm bombs set there by revolting [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]] after the Empire took over the city. A [[talking bomb]] invented by the Ugnaughts tricked the bombtroopers into killing themselves when it had them arm the explosive rather than disarm it. ==Equipment== Bombtroopers wore specially modified heavy fire-resistant armor for flame precautions. The armor was likewise strong enough to withstand controlled explosions and high-velocity shrapnel. For further aid, a long hood covered the faceplate, and they all wore safety helmets. Their helmets included sensors for detecting chemical signatures of explosives, as well as a full muffling mode that is automatically enabled at the first sign of a detonation to protect the wearer from eye or ear damage. They carried their tools in large round cases. Overall, their armor strongly resembled that of the [[Cold assault stormtrooper]]s, although with a few notable differences. One of these differences is that the helmets are replaced with domed hats with a protrusion on each side, and the other was their having striped sleeves on their arms and near the torso. ==Behind the scenes== The bombtrooper was created by [[David Michelinie]], [[Walter Simonson]], and [[Tom Palmer]]. Certain elements of the armor's design, most notably the helmets, were taken from unused concept sketches for the snowtrooper armor in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' (1977) 56]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 56}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]'' {{1stID|bomb squad stormtrooper and bombtrooper}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Bombentruppen |fi=Pommisotilas }} [[Category:Galactic Empire stormtrooper variants]]
